programs.title: Lock, Stock & Two Smoking Barrels
programs.desc: When four criminals lose a rigged poker game against a kingpin, he gives them one week to settle their debt.

programs.title: The Fourth Angel
programs.desc: Jack watched as his family was murdered and the killers are set free, so he takes matters into his own hands.

programs.title: Eye in the Sky
programs.desc: A lieutenant general and a colonel face opposition after ordering a drone strike to take out suicide bombers.

programs.title: Light of My Life
programs.desc: A father and child journey through the outskirts of society after a pandemic wipes out half the population.

programs.title: Kill Me Three Times
programs.desc: A hit-man finds himself in three tales of murder, blackmail and revenge after a botched contract assignment.

programs.title: The Grudge
programs.desc: A nurse is exposed to a supernatural curse, one that locks a person in a powerful rage before killing them.
